picks.quote: Trey Ogden is definitely somebody we want to put in value play consideration... I think he shows up and beats Thiago Moises everywhere
I think she's very live... I think Mackenzie Dern is live
Bruno Lopez is way more dangerous than his opponent this week... I think Bruno Lopez can end up getting a first round knockout
I think he should be in value play consideration but really he shouldn't... I think in a situation like this it makes more sense to just have a bet on Christian Rodriguez
I think he's going to be the cheapest fighter that we're comfortable playing... I'll take that
My Preferred Choice in this one though would be Jose Johnson at 8600
